description: A potential new customer wants a quote for auto insurance for their vehicle.

nodes.task_description: Gather personal information and vehicle details (make, model, year, VIN).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully collects all required customer and vehicle data.

nodes.task_description: Run a Motor Vehicle Report (MVR) to check the customer's driving record.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully retrieves the MVR and notes one speeding ticket from two years ago.

nodes.task_description: Present a quote with different coverage options (liability, collision, comprehensive) and pricing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a clear, multi-option quote to the customer.
